title: Press-shop run report #12345
body: Overnight press-shop run produced 412 units with two stamping-die rejects on the primary line. Tolerances held within spec. Shift lead flagged one coil-feed intermittent fault; root cause analysis pending. Overnight maintenance applied a lubrication pass and replaced one seal; downtime 14 minutes total. Crew recommended scheduling a dry-run recalibration during the next planned stoppage.
author: shift-lead-a
